prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `22208ba4`.
codex_response:
Implemented `task_22208ba4`. The rule is: detect the four monochrome corner blocks, move every block whose color appears in more than one corner diagonally inward by its own height and width, and leave unique-color corner blocks in place on the orange background.

I used the `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint and discarded the `arc2_sonnet45_summary.jsonl` hint because it added incorrect corner-specific exceptions; that note is recorded in [notes.md](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_22208ba4/notes.md). No new primitive was needed. The generator stays close to the official family by sampling square corner blocks on background `7`, using one repeated color across 2-4 corners plus distinct unique corner colors, and constraining sizes so the background remains dominant and moved blocks stay in the interior band.

Verification passed: official examples `5/5`, generated examples `1000/1000`, and I visually checked the preview sheet.
